OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 00
Recv ID: 00
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 00

      "Etat du compresseur de CLIM": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },

        "bitoffset": 2,

        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 8,
    "sentbytes": "076D",

    "deny_sds": [],
